info.title: The Bodybuilding Doctor API
info.description: REST API for the mobile app (Sanctum bearer token) and admin dashboard.

post.summary: Login and receive a Sanctum token

422.description: Invalid credentials or no app access

post.summary: Submit a course or mentorship inquiry

get.summary: Redirect to hosted video file (signed URL or bearer token)

sanctum.description: Token returned by POST /auth/login. Send as `Authorization: Bearer {token}`.
